bug_report.summary: CLI preferences export (-x) appears to be forwarded to running JabRef instance and logs misleading 'Imported entries' message
steps_to_reproduce: In a terminal, run preferences export: `"$JABREF_BIN" -x "$CLI_DIR/prefs-export.xml"`
expected_behaviors: CLI export writes the preferences export file and exits cleanly (or at least reports an export-related message).
actual_behaviors: Terminal output indicates: "arguments passed on to running JabRef instance. Shutting down." and includes an "Imported entries" log line, which is inconsistent with exporting preferences and suggests the CLI export path may not be executed directly.

bug_report.summary: File menu left icon gutter shows rendering differences (icons/spacing appear clipped or inconsistent)
steps_to_reproduce: Look at the left edge of the File menu items (icon/checkmark gutter) around the disabled Save items and Import/Export entries.
expected_behaviors: Menu item icons and the left gutter spacing should match prior rendering (consistent padding; no clipping/misalignment).
actual_behaviors: Small but visible differences appear in the File menu’s left gutter (near Save library/Save library as…/Import area), suggesting icons or spacing are rendered/clipped differently than before.
